name: White Sauce, Thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Whisk together the flour and melted butter until smooth.
3. Gradually add cold milk (or other liquid) while whisking to prevent lumps.
4. Add salt and continue whisking.
5. Heat the mixture, stirring constantly, until it thickens.
6. Cook for an additional 10 minutes over low heat, stirring occasionally.
